title: Glaiden's gas mask mod
description: Simple mod that adds usefull gas masks to the game.
body:
Glaiden's gas mask mod adds 2 types of gas masks to the game.
All of them prevent player from getting any potion effects

except instant damage.


Gas mask

![gas mask](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/257c48e94350a7189923d38dce055e5483f0442d.png)

simple gas mask
![gas mask crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afd6df1c768b0f1628c6321946a113251f183405.png)

Reinforced gas mask

![reinforced gas mask](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1b2b0f488987a15cc6c10fcfab5d9e74ec45241.png)
gas mask with netherite helmet stats
![reinforced gas mask crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/421f2cd93862606af22d4c5531b6c9abf2c42254.png)

other crafts
